title: fumaria numidica var. delicatula
intro: Fumaria numidica var. delicatula, also known as Fumaria delicatula, is a rare and lesser-known species within the Fumaria genus of plants, which are annual or biennial flowering plants with a range of medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids, including fumarine, which have been found to have potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Fumaria numidica var. delicatula has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Fumaria numidica var. delicatula can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
